title: as soon as / the moment + S + V（一……就……）

formulas.formula: As soon as / The moment / Once + S + V, S + V
formulas.zh: 一……就……；強調兩個動作緊接發生，子句用現在式代未來

formulas.formula: No sooner + had + S + V + than + S + V（倒裝）
formulas.zh: 倒裝表達「剛……就……」，主句用過去完成式

explanation: 此句型用來表達兩個動作的緊接發生關係。時間副詞子句（as soon as / the moment / once）引導前置動作，主句表後續動作。重點是子句縱使指未來事件，仍用現在式，不用未來式。倒裝形式 no sooner...than、hardly...when 意義相同但語氣更強，使用過去完成式。易混淆之處在於忘記用現在式替代未來式，或混淆倒裝與非倒裝的時態搭配。

examples.eng: As soon as you arrive at the airport, call me immediately.
examples.chi: 你一到達機場，就立刻打電話給我。

examples.eng: The moment the teacher enters the classroom, all students stop talking.
examples.chi: 老師一進教室，所有學生就停止說話。

examples.eng: Once you finish your homework, you can play video games.
examples.chi: 你一完成功課，就可以玩電動。

examples.eng: No sooner had he heard the news than he rushed to the hospital.
examples.chi: 他剛聽到這個消息就趕往醫院。

extension.tip: 判斷時態時，記住：時間副詞子句縱使表未來，仍用現在式。倒裝形式 no sooner/hardly/scarcely 必搭過去完成式在主句，than/when 後用簡單過去式。若混淆時態會導致文法錯誤。

examples.test: ✗ As soon as you will arrive, I will pick you up.
examples.result: → ✓ As soon as you arrive, I will pick you up.（子句用現在式）

examples.test: ✗ No sooner did he leave than his boss called.
examples.result: → ✓ No sooner had he left than his boss called.（主句用過去完成式）

examples.test: ✓ The moment she enters, everyone applauds.
examples.result: → 現在式背景下的標準用法，表習慣性動作

extension.note: 時間副詞子句永遠現在式，倒裝形式主句用過去完成式——三個關鍵不能混。

exercises.sentence: As soon as the meeting ends, everyone left the room.
exercises.translation: 會議一結束，每個人都離開了房間。

parts: this form, submit it to the office.
exercises.sentence: The moment you complete this form, submit it to the office.
exercises.translation: 你一填完這個表格，就提交到辦公室。

parts: the news than she called her parents.
exercises.sentence: No sooner had she heard the news than she called her parents.
exercises.translation: 她剛聽到消息就打電話給父母。

parts: the exam, they can go home.
exercises.sentence: Once the students finish the exam, they can go home.
exercises.translation: 學生一完成考試，就可以回家。

vocab_table.zh: 一……就……（最常見，任何時態背景）
一……就……（強調時間點，較正式）
一旦；一……就……（帶有條件色彩）
幾乎沒有……就……（倒裝，書面語）
